data.title: WiLD expands to Finland, enhancing Nordic collaboration in life science leadership for women across Denmark, Finland, Norway, and Sweden.
data.description: WiLD is enhancing collaboration within the Nordic region encompassing Denmark, Finland, Norway, and Sweden. This initiative aims to boost the representation of women in leadership roles within the life sciences industry. Formed as a non-profit organization, Women in Life Science Denmark (WiLD) is spearheading efforts to promote the advancement of women professionals in senior positions. The collaboration efforts are expected to bring together a significant number of industry experts and leaders from the four countries to collectively address the challenges faced by women in the sector. The partnership between WiLD and other organizations in the Nordic region showcases a commitment to fostering diversity and gender equality, with the goal of driving positive change in the industry.

data.title: Prosafe SE's fleet utilization in December 2025 was 100%, with Safe Boreas receiving full day rate from 15th.
data.description: In December 2025, the fleet utilization was at full capacity, standing at 100%. Specifically, the vessel Safe Boreas started receiving its full day rate from December 15th onwards.

data.title: Latin America media revenues to hit $65 billion by 2026 with 10.7% YoY growth, surpassing US. Advertising & bundling key factors.
data.description: In a recent presentation at Content Americas, Maria Rua Aguete from Omdia revealed that Latin America is poised to become one of the fastest-growing media markets globally. By 2026, the region is projected to hit $65 billion in revenues, marking a notable 10.7% annual growth rate. In comparison, the US, during the same period, is forecasted to grow by 6.9% to $453 billion. This rapid expansion in LATAM's media sector is primarily fueled by the swift adoption of new technologies.

data.title: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin listed on Binance as market cap surpasses $1.3B, now trading with XRP and USDT pairs.
data.description: Binance has introduced RLUSD spot trading, available with XRP and USDT pairs. Ripple's stablecoin, RLUSD, is now tradable on the largest exchange globally after exceeding a market capitalization of over $1.3 billion. For more information, refer to the full article.

data.title: Fosun Int'l (HKEX: 00656) ESG score rises to 4.2, ranking among global leaders for the 5th time.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 21, 2026, FTSE Russell, a prominent index company, revealed that Fosun International Limited (listed as 00656 on the HKEX) had received an Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) rating of 4.2. This new score marks an increase for Fosun International, showcasing its commitment to sustainable practices.

data.title: Rockwell Automation to power Lucid's EV facility in Saudi Arabia with software solutions. Supporting Vision 2030. Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: Rockwell Automation, Inc. is set to provide FactoryTalk® MES and on-site assistance to bolster the production of electric vehicles (EVs) and enhance workforce training in support of Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030. The initiative is taking place in DAMMAM, Saudi Arabia and was announced on January 21, 2026. As per the New York Stock Exchange, Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) is recognized as the leading global entity specializing in industrial automation. This strategic collaboration aims to align manufacturing processes with the objectives of Vision 2030, demonstrating a commitment to advancing the EV sector in the region.

data.title: Lendable raises $500M with first close of two blended-finance funds, achieves rare investment-grade rating.
data.description: Lendable, a prominent provider of asset-backed credit to rapidly expanding companies worldwide, has announced the initial closing of its two new blended-finance funds. With this development, the company is advancing towards raising a significant sum of $500 million. Additionally, they have achieved a rare feat by securing an investment-grade rating.

data.title: German companies are increasingly using public cloud services for AI, as shown in growing AI deployments, ISG reports.
data.description: In Germany, enterprises are increasingly embracing cloud services tailored for artificial intelligence (AI) tasks to accommodate the rising number of AI implementations. According to ISG, this strategic shift reflects a growing trend towards leveraging specialized cloud solutions for AI workloads among businesses in the region.
